name: Digital Anemometer with Temperature
tagline: 0–45 m/s / 0–140 km/h air speed anemometer with simultaneous air temperature measurement, analog bar graph, wind chill and Avg/Min/Max hold.
description: The Vartech V 6250 B is an economical, high-quality digital anemometer that measures both air speed and air temperature simultaneously. Air speed is displayed in m/s or km/h alongside a real-time analog bar graph for quick trend reading. The instrument also computes and displays wind chill temperature. A large backlit LCD makes readings easy in field conditions. Data Hold, Avg/Min/Max memory and Auto Power Off round out the feature set, making the V 6250 B well suited for HVAC commissioning, ventilation testing, industrial air flow assessment and environmental monitoring.
features: Analog bar graph for real-time trend reading

specs.label: Display
specs.value: Large LCD with backlight  |  Analog bar graph
